payload.answer: Weather observations like “Today’s weather is cloudy” are time-sensitive and usually not durable personal memory. If you still want to track it, choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Do not save this as durable memory.
Save it only as a dated journal/log entry for today.
Tell me if this reflects a durable preference or recurring fact instead, such as preferring cloudy weather or often experiencing cloudy weather in your location.
